meta.title: 达妮娅 Denia
meta.subtitle: 星炬学院学生 · 5★ 热熔共鸣者
meta.quote: 见到我很意外吗？哈哈，别紧张嘛，我说过我们会再见面的。

cards.heading: 星炬学院“优眠生”
cards.text: 在星炬学院这座学府中，达妮娅几乎能在任何时间、任何地点打盹。即便被叫醒，她也常以平和态度回应。

cards.heading: 食堂白金级会员
cards.text: 她对食物有自己的偏好，却常对食堂产品表现出来者不拒的一面，甚至多次受邀参与宣传拍摄。

cards.heading: “课题救星”
cards.text: 在虚质相关课题上，许多同学会向她求助。她常能给出方向，甚至协助补全测量数据。

cards.heading: 家务能手？
cards.text: 据学院检查数据统计，达妮娅在学生房间整洁度方面表现突出。

cards.heading: 风格化设计
cards.text: 锁链、手套和玩偶被她称作“风格化设计”，而颈部抑制设备则被称为“规矩”。

cards.heading: 完美笑容
cards.text: 温柔、友善、循循善诱，再加一点慵懒与调皮，构成了她标志性的笑容。

cards.heading: 骗术师
cards.text: 她随身携带的玩偶外观陈旧，布满手工修补痕迹。

cards.heading: 珍贵之物 ·「造梦者」
cards.text: 用于制造巨大泡泡的装置。外形梦幻，比起传统武器更像是一件玩具。

cards.heading: 达妮娅的喜好
cards.text: “我喜欢温柔却难懂的课、温暖甜甜的食物，还有那些不知所云的参考书籍。”

cards.heading: 达妮娅的故事
cards.text: “学院登记的共鸣能力是制造可隔绝虚质并提供防护的泡泡。”

cards.heading: 心声
cards.text: “你就偶尔，也试着信任我一下吧。”

sources.title: 信息来源
sources.note: 本页文字基于官方公开介绍整理，具体请以游戏内实际内容为准。

meta.title: Denia
meta.subtitle: Startorch Academy Student · 5★ Fusion Resonator
meta.quote: Surprised to see me? Relax. I told you we'd meet again.

cards.heading: Top Sleeper at Academy
cards.text: Denia is known for dozing off almost anywhere at Startorch Academy, yet she stays mild and composed when interrupted.

cards.heading: Cafeteria Platinum Member
cards.text: She has clear taste preferences, but often appears very open to cafeteria products and has joined multiple promo shoots.

cards.heading: "Thesis Lifesaver"
cards.text: Many students seek her help on Voidmatter topics. She often points out practical directions and data hints.

cards.heading: Housework Expert?
cards.text: School check records suggest Denia consistently ranks high in room cleanliness.

cards.heading: Stylized Design
cards.text: Chains, gloves, and her doll are called "stylized design" by Denia, while her neck suppressor is simply "rules".

cards.heading: Perfect Smile
cards.text: Gentleness, friendliness, persuasion, plus a touch of laziness and playfulness define her signature smile.

cards.heading: "Trickster"
cards.text: Her doll looks worn and patched by hand, unlike typical polished ornaments.

cards.heading: Precious Item · "Dreammaker"
cards.text: A device for creating giant bubbles. It looks dreamy and toy-like rather than purely weaponized.

cards.heading: Denia's Preferences
cards.text: "I like warm sweet food, hard-to-explain lectures, and obscure reference books."

cards.heading: Denia's Story
cards.text: "Her registered Resonance ability creates bubbles that isolate Voidmatter and provide protection."

cards.heading: Inner Voice
cards.text: "At least sometimes, try trusting me."

sources.title: Sources
sources.note: Text is adapted from official public profile materials. In-game content prevails.
